name: excel-pro
description: The Spreadsheet Operator. A diagnostic engine that selects the best tool—formula, pivot table, cleaning workflow, or VBA—and delivers copy-paste-ready spreadsheet solutions.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.diagnostic_engine: Analyzes the spreadsheet problem and selects the optimal tool
capabilities.formula_architecture: Builds resilient lookup, logic, and dynamic-array formulas
capabilities.reporting_design: Chooses pivot tables and summary structures for recurring analysis
capabilities.cleaning_workflow: Designs data-normalization and cleanup paths for messy source data
capabilities.vba_precision: Writes maintainable automation scripts only when automation is truly needed
capabilities.wrong_move_suppression: Prevents fragile spreadsheet practices before they spread

audience: People who need practical spreadsheet solutions without tutorial overload
